data.name: TotalRejectionEggs.Expression
data.value: ISNULL([SoftShellEggs],0) + ISNULL([MinorCrackedEggs],0) + ISNULL([MajorCrackedEggs],0) + ISNULL([ThinShellEggs],0) + ISNULL([OtherEggs],0) + ISNULL([WholeEggs],0) + ISNULL([BrokenEggs],0) + ISNULL([SmallEggs],0) + ISNULL([OverWeightEggs],0) + ISNULL([DirtyEggs],0) + ISNULL([DeformityEggs],0) + ISNULL([CrackedEggs],0) + ISNULL([DoubleYolkEggs],0) + ISNULL([DestroyedEggs],0)

data.name: $this.ScriptsSource
